title: This Industry Is Secretly Making People Rich
description: In this episode, Sandeep Swadia uncovers a massive, fast-growing industry that's been flying under the radar—one that could define the next decade of wealth creation. With his unique perspective as a monk, MIT grad, CEO, and AI strategist, he shares surprising stories, real-world examples, and the emerging trends that only a few are capitalizing on. This is a rare look into where the smartest innovators are placing their bets, and how you can position yourself before the world catches on.
